title: InterviewMint
overview: A high-fidelity AI interview simulator that provides realistic, low-stakes practice environments with role-specific technical and behavioral questions, real-time feedback, voice input, and detailed session reports.
features: 7 interview modes — Behavioral, Technical, Case Study, System Design, Role-Specific, Mixed, and Rapid Fire
5 difficulty levels — Intern through Director, adjusting question complexity and scoring expectations
Text & voice input — type answers or speak naturally with real-time transcription via Whisper API
AI-powered questions — JD-specific questions tailored to target company and role via Claude/GPT-4
Follow-up engine — dynamic follow-up questions based on answer quality and depth
10 interviewer personas — each with distinct personality, voice, and questioning style via ElevenLabs
Monaco coding environment — full-featured code editor with Judge0 execution and test cases
Session reports — per-question breakdown with content scores, delivery metrics, and PDF download
Progress tracking — session history, score trends, and milestone badges
JobMint integration — receives application context via postMessage, syncs results back
challenges: Building a realistic interview simulation with real-time AI evaluation, voice transcription via Whisper, and dynamic follow-up question generation. Integrating D-ID lip-sync avatars with ElevenLabs voices across 10 distinct personas while maintaining low latency.
outcome: An AI-powered interview practice tool that helps job seekers prepare with realistic simulations, available standalone and embedded within the JobMint ecosystem.
